scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:sbcdev4.com SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@sbcdev4.com;tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@sbcdev4.com Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS>;q=1;expires=[field1];avaya-actions="presence.initiate-pubsub";reg-id=[call_number];+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:[field0]e96aa1e6-11a9-550b-a009-[field0]>" Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
